name: Naju: A Native Discrete State-Space Model with Independent Retention and Writing for Long-Sequence Memory
summary: arXiv:2607.21000v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-sequence memory tracking places two opposing demands on a recurrent state: near-lossless retention of stored bindings over long horizons, and ac...
description: arXiv:2607.21000v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-sequence memory tracking places two opposing demands on a recurrent state: near-lossless retention of stored bindings over long horizons, and active overwriting of stale ones. In our diagnostic suite, the strongest efficient baselines tend to solve only one side well. Continuous-time-parameterized state-space models (SSMs) such as Mamba obtai...
author: Hyuk Lim, Seunghyun Yoon
